subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and my Lord! I beseech Thee to adorn this servant with the ornament of fidelity amidst the concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سیدی اسئلک بان تزین هذا العبد بطراز الوفاء بین ملا
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for sacrifice, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
